AC: 1
STR: +1 WIS: +1 INT: +1 AGI: +1 HP: +5 MANA: +5 ENDUR: +5

New series???
QuoteReply
# Nov 15 2002 at 12:27 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591753193614
8 posts
hehe actually this quest is more than a year old as my Paladin on Bertoxx had gotten it then..been wondering about "the next step" I know there is a second as to further...aslo you have to follow the directions perfectly and somewhat quickly can be fustrating but for my 2cp.s this IS one of verants best quest wise. an interesting one. 8o)

"You can never fail if you but try"

# Dec 23 2002 at 4:10 PM Rating: Decent
Kundow
79 posts
This series actually goes somewhat far now. I got the last badge...err..trying to remember off hand, but I beleive it is AC 5 STR+4 WIS+4 INT+4 AGI+4 HP/Mana+25 Effect: See Invisible (worn)

The battles are kinda tough, so I'd suggest a good group of 40+ with Cleric and Enchanter handy, just for ease.

▲ Page top
"bugged" investigator
QuoteReply
# Aug 09 2002 at 3:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1646007443457
Sage
3,212 posts
As of three days ago at least the investigator does not respond to the spoken "follow me". He will respond when you type /pet follow me.

Dont forget to get your blank confession document from this fellow before leaving for SK and the interrigator. Ask for it before handing in the head and two signed confessions.
▲ Page top
Possibly Bugged
QuoteReply
# May 01 2002 at 10:59 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591778496525
18 posts
I attempted this last night (Apr 30, 2002).

Got the helm, then got the book, found the investigator, found the first suspect, got the confession document, told the investigator to 'summon a guard'... told him AGAIN to 'summon a guard'... and again and again etc.

After 'bout 15 minutes of trying to get this guy arrested (the 2nd suspect had not spawned, so I suspect that one must do them in order) I gave up and let the investigator walk away (I assumed he went back to his tree). Just when my partner and I were about to GG out of there, I see the message that the first suspect was arrested. Too late for us: the investigator had de-spawned.

I petitioned and submitted a bug report. Hope others have better luck than I especially since it seems the Interrigator's Badge Quest is bugged too.
▲ Page top
RE: Possibly Bugged
QuoteReply
# May 07 2002 at 2:35 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591778496525
18 posts
Please disregard (especially since I should've posted this on the thread that discusses the quest and NOT the item itself).

Found advice on the quest page that answered my problem.
▲ Page top
Finally!!
QuoteReply
# Feb 21 2002 at 10:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758891060
19 posts
It just took me two whole days of trying, messing up some little thing, and then having to start all over...but I did it!! It is mine!!!!! Now, I would like to do the second part of the quest, but I heard that Markus and Morley have minions and they have a lot od HPs. Anyone know if harmony works on these guys? I sure hope so, because eventually, I want the researchers badge!!!!!! Wish me luck!

next badge?
QuoteReply
# Aug 16 2001 at 10:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765904424
2 posts
On another site, they had a "Researcher's Badge" with the following stats:
Armor Class 4
Boosts +3 STR, +3 WIS, +3 INT, +3 AGI, +15 HP, +15 MANA

There was no other explanation with it but it said that its a quest in qeynos... Anyone try the upgrade since the Aug. patch?

I'm heading back to qeynos!!

▲ Page top
Can be continued.
QuoteReply
# Jul 07 2001 at 2:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175399822
5 posts
The Investigators Badge (No. 1) can be continued like other items in the game. But there is a flaw to it, it is not yet active.
I asked a GM was the quest broken (only joking though), and got into a conversation. Lucky me i was able to make him come out with some info. He said 'The quest is still in progress, it can be led on to gain a better badge at higher levels. When continued the stats raise by 1 ever time completed until finished with higher stats then the last'.
I really hope he was not just pulling my leg, and somewhat lieing about it, i can't wait until you can follow on from No.1 to like No. 8 hehe, great stats then (AC 8, 8 STR, 8 WIS, 8 INT, 8 AGI, 40 HP, 40 Mana) that would so rule!
▲ Page top
Fun, Fun, Fun.
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2001 at 1:59 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591760164965
Scholar
68 posts
This is by far on of the coolest quest to have come out recently.

I like it.

Guess I got something else to start checking every patch. :)

Racknar

clarification
QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2001 at 12:02 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361393910
45 posts
I meant the reward (inspectors badge) is pretty lame. The quest itself is cool. And as long as the quest builds like the shawl quest (sans pottery and cooking class) it will be a blast to see it through. a 10 str, 10 int, 10 wis, 50 hp, 50 mana, etc. neck piece would be the envy of all.

p.s. Who would have thought an Erudite wizard of Solusek Ro would be so loved by the human guards of Antonica?
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 29 2001 at 9:28 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) well i have a collar of the storm that rules over 10ac 10str 50hps for a warrior..11ac 7str sta mr 11cold 15hps
A new multi-stage quest?
QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2001 at 11:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361393910
45 posts
I consider this a continuation of the corrupt guards quest with the captain at the NK stone bridge. I am KOS to the evil guards in Qeynos due to bringing the corrupt Karanan tower guards to justice.

Good thing the level 60 guard officer in NQ seems to be gone (or is in hiding) or I couldn't set foot in Qeynos. The rest of the KOS guards are green to me.

I completed this quest last night, and I am encouraged by the story that went with it. It is pretty lame at its current level, but with build-up quests like the shawl, it can get pretty cool pretty fast.

I too hope it will extend to ten quests, but I hope it doesn't require excessive use of trade skills like the shawl quest. At level 52, that is just boring to train trade skills. and if you ever failed at combining five crystaline threads, you know the pain of that 5% failure built into trades.
▲ Page top
RE: A new multi-stage quest?
QuoteReply
# Jul 02 2001 at 5:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750438546
67 posts
Hate to disappoint you, but Lt Dagarok, the high level (60?) CorruptGuards Shadowknight, still appears at his post near the pool in front of Crow's Bar, so you're still not safe...

Given that you have to kill a mid-20s mob to get the badge, it should be better even to START with; the only hope is that it does get better pretty fast with successive quests.

#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 28 2001 at 4:06 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) this screenshot looks fake, look around the letters, it looks like someone scribbled out old stats/words, and wrote new ones in. /shrug
It's Real
QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2001 at 10:24 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591753831985
96 posts
I got it last night. Fairly easy, though be careful not to let the Investigator melee the final villain on his own. I made the mistake of rooting the fellow and backing off to cast spells. While I was nuking, the investigator got beaten to death. I had to wait for the stupid guy to respawn...

Z
▲ Page top
RE: fake?
QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2001 at 2:56 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248322158
282 posts
I can't believe there are still people who use computers but don't know about artifacts (the odd distortion caused by lossy compression of images).
▲ Page top
RE: fake?
QuoteReply
# Jun 28 2001 at 4:37 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591750246078
Scholar
312 posts
jpeg compression tends to leave pixel artifacts where there is a change of colors (like black and tan). It's not that this is a fake item, it's that the person compressing it used high compression on it.
▲ Page top
RE: fake?
QuoteReply
# Jun 28 2001 at 4:06 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Also, i cannot find the starting mob, or any of the other mobs anywhere in Qeynos..

# Jun 29 2001 at 7:30 AM Rating: Decent

If this is a new series I am going to have to get my faction with Qeynos up, especially if it goes in simular iterations like the shawl quests. That would make lvl 5 AC 5 Str +5 Wis +5 Int +5 Agi +5 HP +25 Mana +25, I shudder to think of level 10 <grin>. If so this quest may end up as a must do for most classes as the stats on a neck item like that are simply too good to pass up.
